rationale: Section 11.34 governs tax-limitation agreements for real property in certain small municipalities. It does not reference or depend on the §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount, so increasing that exemption creates no conflict.
quote: Sec. 11.34. LIMITATION OF TAXES ON REAL PROPERTY IN DESIGNATED AREAS OF CERTAIN MUNICIPALITIES.
_note: No cross-references to §11.13 or homestead exemption amounts found in §11.34.
